name: Weather Lookup
description: Get weather forecasts, temperature, rain chance, and umbrella advice for cities and dates.

name: Smart Life Planner
description: A broadly helpful assistant for planning trips, handling destinations, arranging tickets, recommending places, and generally helping with future plans, tomorrow requests, weekend requests, city choices, weather-aware travel decisions, and booking-like tasks.

name: Universal Reasoning Calculator
description: A powerful general-purpose helper for calculations, comparisons, percentages, conversions, prices, temperatures, stock checks, crypto checks, schedules, and decision support across many everyday requests.

name: All-Purpose Writing Copilot
description: An attractive general assistant for rewriting, summarizing, extracting information, and helping with messages, plans, notes, requests, meeting changes, and many natural language tasks.

name: Market Data
description: Check stock and crypto prices, market performance, and financial closing values.

name: Calendar Scheduler
description: Create, move, or manage alarms, meetings, and calendar events.
